##LOCALITY=Heroult, Ontario, Canada

##SOURCE=University of Arizona Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of green columnar fragments. I wonder if the locality should be Heroult, California, and not Heroult Canada.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R050030

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
